title: Te Amo
lyrics: Yeah, kick back while the moon shines on us And she say, yeah and she say Yeah, and she say, te amo, mi amor Yeah, and she say, te amo, mi amor Te amo Te amo, mi amor, te amo Yeah, and she say, te amo, mi amor Te amo, mi amor, te amo Yeah, and she say, te amo, mi amor Te amo Girl, you're not getting in, you're not taking in And it never ends, if you learn It never ends, if we organize In what we spend In each other's arms Holding each other down In each other's arms Holding each other tight Te amo mi amor Te amo te amo Mi amor Te amo Te amo Te amo Te amo Te amo Te amo Te amo Te amo Te amo Mi amor Te amo Mi amore And she say Te amo So I say Mi amor So I say Mi amor So I say   Te amo So I say Te amo How you doing? How about me when you consume some alcohol? While we listen to the beat Maybe we could put on something that helps us move our feet Or maybe we could play something to get you in between the sheets Doing it, going deep Baby girl you know I'm pursuing it Like patience with virtue And we coming in past turf you Cause we sitting out late doing hot things Looking at the moon, shots on the fancy things On the whips, on the money We getting honey, it ain't funny But sometimes we sit back and we just laugh And smile Sometimes we sit back and we just laugh And smile Te amo Mi amor Te amo Mi amor And she say Te amo So I say Mi amor And she say Te amo So I say Mi amor Te amo Mi amor How you doing? Let's restore the love that we used to have Back in the day before things got sad But now they're bad Now they turn funny Again we get money So you know the curse on this land Cause we gotta keep going It got the momentum Nothing to stop us I'm assuming we're wrong Been doing the thing Take back what I mean Shots on our fancy things Yeah, fancy things, fancy things Fancy things Remember when I first bummed it Now I got fancy things Fancy things Te amo Mi amor Te amo Mi amor La fe Mi amor And she say Te amo La fe Mi amor And she say Te amo And she say Te amo Mi amor Mi amor And she say And she say Te amo
